note: Aliases: image, img. 'src' (alias 'path') required. Source resolved by ImageSource — file path, URL, data-URI, raw bytes.

src.description: image source — file path, HTTP(S) URL, or data URI (data:image/png;base64,...). Add/set-only input; the image is embedded as an ImagePart and not round-tripped, so Get does NOT surface this key.
src.readback: add/set-only input; Get does not surface this key.

crop.description: Crop in percent (0-100). 1 value = symmetric, 2 values = vertical,horizontal, 4 values = left,top,right,bottom.

cropLeft.description: Crop from left edge as percent (0-100). Aliases: cropleft.

cropRight.description: Crop from right edge as percent (0-100). Aliases: cropright.

cropTop.description: Crop from top edge as percent (0-100). Aliases: croptop.

cropBottom.description: Crop from bottom edge as percent (0-100). Aliases: cropbottom.

mediaType.description: logical media kind derived from VideoFromFile / AudioFromFile presence under the picture. One of `picture`, `video`, `audio`. Surfaces only via the `image`/`video`/`audio`/`media` selectors.

contentType.description: OOXML content-type of the embedded image part (e.g. `image/png`, `image/jpeg`). Read from the package part referenced by the BlipFill embed relationship.
contentType.readback: MIME-style content-type string from the image part

fileSize.description: embedded image file size in bytes (length of the image part stream).
fileSize.readback: byte length of the embedded image part

id.description: OOXML shape id; source of the @id in the stable path /picture[@id=ID].

alt.readback: alt text string (description); returns "(missing)" when absent
